style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. At the center, a sturdy keep labelled « NOYAU CENTRAL » with a short stacked list inside reading « CYBERSÉCURITÉ », « IDENTITÉ », « RÉSEAU », « DONNÉES ». Arrows radiate outward to four small workshop boxes around it labelled « BÂTISSEURS MINISTÉRIELS ». A band along the bottom reads PRONGHORN · NEXUS · VÉLOCITÉ. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
